languages.original_text: {n}Folding his arms over his stomach, the Tech-Priest addresses Nuncius:{/n} "Scepticism is undeniably one of the instruments of Knowledge, dearest colleague. It guards us against many heresies, preventing ego and vanity from clouding reason on the path of service. But as you see, Nuncius, it is not justified in every circumstance." {n}After a moment's silence, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader, Nuncius states that you are a person of rare perspicacity and prudence. I record this as an incontrovertible fact and thank you for your hospitality."

languages.text: {n}Сложив руки на животе, техножрец обращается к Нунциусу:{/n} "Скепсис неоспоримо является одним из инструментов Познания, дражайший коллега. Он бережет нас от многих ересей, не позволяя эго и тщеславию затмевать разум на пути служения. Но, как видишь, Нунциус, не в каждой ситуации он оправдан". {n}Помолчав, Эоганн кивает.{/n} "Вольный Торговец, Нунциус констатирует, что вы — человек редкой проницательности и предусмотрительности. Я фиксирую это как неоспоримый факт и благодарю за гостеприимство".

languages.text: {n}腹を両腕で抱え、テクプリストがヌンシウスに語りかける。{/n}「疑いは知識の道具の一つであることは否定できません、最愛の同僚。それは多くの異端から我々を守り、自己や虚栄心が奉仕の道で理性に影を落とすのを防ぎます。しかし、ヌンシウス、それはあらゆる状況で正当化されるものではありません。」{n}しばらく沈黙の後、エオガンが頷く.{/n}「ならず者商人、ヌンシウスは貴方が稀に見る洞察力と慎重さを備えた人物だと述べています。私はこれを確かな事実として記録し、貴方の温かいもてなしに感謝いたします」
languages.original_text: {n}Folding his arms over his stomach, the Tech-Priest addresses Nuncius:{/n} "Scepticism is undeniably one of the instruments of Knowledge, dearest colleague. It guards us against many heresies, preventing ego and vanity from clouding reason on the path of service. But as you see, Nuncius, it is not justified in every circumstance." {n}After a moment's silence, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader, Nuncius states that you are a person of rare perspicacity and prudence. I record this as an incontrovertible fact and thank you for your hospitality."

languages.text: {n}Der Techpriester verschränkt die Arme vor seiner Brust und wendet sich an Nuncius:{/n} "Skeptizismus ist fraglos eines der Instrumente des Wissens, geschätzter Kollege. Er schützt uns vor vielen Häresien und verhindert, dass auf dem Weg des Dienstes Stolz und Eitelkeit den Verstand trüben. Aber wie Ihr seht, Nuncius, ist er nicht in jedem Fall gerechtfertigt." {n}Eogunn verstummt und nickt schließlich.{/n} "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, Nuncius sagt, Ihr seid eine Person mit einer außergewöhnlichen Scharfsicht und Klugheit. Ich verzeichne dies als unumstößliche Tatsache und danke Euch für Eure Gastfreundschaft."
languages.original_text: {n}Folding his arms over his stomach, the Tech-Priest addresses Nuncius:{/n} "Scepticism is undeniably one of the instruments of Knowledge, dearest colleague. It guards us against many heresies, preventing ego and vanity from clouding reason on the path of service. I record this as an incontrovertible fact and thank you for your hospitality."

Er schützt uns vor vielen Häresien und verhindert, dass auf dem Weg des Dienstes Stolz und Eitelkeit den Verstand trüben. Aber wie Ihr seht, Nuncius, ist er nicht in jedem Fall gerechtfertigt." {n}Eo-gann verstummt und nickt schließlich.{/n} "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, Nuncius sagt, Ihr seid eine Person mit einer außergewöhnlichen Scharfsicht und Klugheit. Ich verzeichne dies als unumstößliche Tatsache und danke Euch für Eure Gastfreundschaft."

languages.text: {n}El tecnosacerdote se cruza de brazos y se dirige a Nuncius:{/n} «El escepticismo es uno de los instrumentos del Conocimiento, estimado colega. Nos protege de numerosas herejías evitando que el ego y la vanidad nublen nuestra razón en el cumplimiento de nuestro oficio. Pero como puedes ver, Nuncius, hay circunstancias en las que no está justificado». {n}Tras un breve silencio, Eogunn asiente con la cabeza.{/n} «Comerciante Independiente, Nuncius declara que es usted inusualmente perspicaz y prudente. Lo considero un hecho incuestionable y agradezco su hospitalidad».
languages.original_text: {n}Folding his arms over his stomach, the Tech-Priest addresses Nuncius:{/n} "Scepticism is undeniably one of the instruments of Knowledge, dearest colleague. It guards us against many heresies, preventing ego and vanity from clouding reason on the path of service. But as you see, Nuncius, it is not justified in every circumstance." {n}After a moment's silence, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader, Nuncius states that you are a person of rare perspicacity and prudence. I record this as an incontrovertible fact and thank you for your hospitality."

Nos protege de numerosas herejías evitando que el ego y la vanidad nublen nuestra razón en el cumplimiento de nuestro oficio. Pero como puedes ver, Nuncius, hay circunstancias en las que no está justificado». {n}Tras un breve silencio, Eo-gann asiente con la cabeza.{/n} «Comerciante Independiente, Nuncius declara que es usted inusualmente perspicaz y prudente. Lo considero un hecho incuestionable y agradezco su hospitalidad».

languages.text: {n}Kollarını midesinin üzerinde kavuşturan Tekno Rahip, Nuncius'a hitap ediyor.{/n} "Kuşkuculuk, inkâr edilemez bir şekilde İrfan'ın araçlarından biridir pek değerli meslektaşım. Bizi pek çok kâfirlikten korur, ego ve kibrin hizmet yolunda aklı bulandırmasını önler. Ancak gördüğün gibi Nuncius, her koşulda haklı çıkmaz." {n}Bir anlık sessizlikten sonra Eogunn başını sallıyor.{/n} "Hür Tacir, Nuncius sizin nadir bulunan bir feraset ve basirete sahip bir kimse olduğunuzu belirtiyor. Bunu tartışılmaz bir gerçek olarak kaydediyor ve misafirperverliğiniz için teşekkür ediyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Folding his arms over his stomach, the Tech-Priest addresses Nuncius:{/n} "Scepticism is undeniably one of the instruments of Knowledge, dearest colleague. It guards us against many heresies, preventing ego and vanity from clouding reason on the path of service. But as you see, Nuncius, it is not justified in every circumstance." {n}After a moment's silence, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader, Nuncius states that you are a person of rare perspicacity and prudence. I record this as an incontrovertible fact and thank you for your hospitality."

Bunu tartışılmaz bir gerçek olarak kaydediyor ve misafirperverliğiniz için teşekkür ediyorum."

languages.text: {n}Le technoprêtre se tourne vers Nuncius en croisant les bras sur son ventre :{/n} « Le scepticisme est un instrument comme un autre de la connaissance, mon cher confrère. Il nous protège contre bien des hérésies et empêche l'ego et la vanité de faire barrage à la raison sur la voie du service. Mais comme tu peux le constater, Nuncius, il n'est pas toujours justifié. » {n}Après un court silence, Eogunn hoche la tête.{/n} « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, Nuncius affirme que vous êtes d'une rare perspicacité et d'une indéniable prudence. Je consignerai donc cela comme un fait incontestable et vous remercie pour votre hospitalité. »
languages.original_text: {n}Folding his arms over his stomach, the Tech-Priest addresses Nuncius:{/n} "Scepticism is undeniably one of the instruments of Knowledge, dearest colleague. It guards us against many heresies, preventing ego and vanity from clouding reason on the path of service. But as you see, Nuncius, it is not justified in every circumstance." {n}After a moment's silence, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader, Nuncius states that you are a person of rare perspicacity and prudence. I record this as an incontrovertible fact and thank you for your hospitality."

Il nous protège contre bien des hérésies et empêche l'ego et la vanité de faire barrage à la raison sur la voie du service. Mais comme tu peux le constater, Nuncius, il n'est pas toujours justifié. » {n}Après un court silence, Eo-gann hoche la tête.{/n} « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, Nuncius affirme que vous êtes d'une rare perspicacité et d'une indéniable prudence. Je consignerai donc cela comme un fait incontestable et vous remercie pour votre hospitalité. »

languages.text: {n}技术神甫双臂交叠于腹部，对努恩修斯说道：{/n}“怀疑无疑是知识的工具之一，亲爱的同僚。它保护我们免受诸多异端的侵害，防止在侍奉之路上被自负与虚荣蒙蔽理性。但如你所见，努恩修斯，它并非在所有情况下都合理。”{n}片刻沉默后，伊奥贡点了点头。{/n}“行商浪人，努恩修斯认为您兼具罕见的洞察力和审慎。我将其记录为不容辩驳的事实，并感谢您的款待。”
languages.original_text: {n}Folding his arms over his stomach, the Tech-Priest addresses Nuncius:{/n} "Scepticism is undeniably one of the instruments of Knowledge, dearest colleague. It guards us against many heresies, preventing ego and vanity from clouding reason on the path of service. But as you see, Nuncius, it is not justified in every circumstance." {n}After a moment's silence, Eogunn nods.{/n} "Rogue Trader, Nuncius states that you are a person of rare perspicacity and prudence. I record this as an incontrovertible fact and thank you for your hospitality."
